case_title: THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES et al VS. GOODWOOD CABINETS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH  AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL

COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH  AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL
MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-14-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-12-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: RESPONDENT'S COUNSEL DID NOT NOTIFY PETITIONER OF HIS INTENT TO APPEAR AT TODAY'S HEARING. THE COURT DENIED RESPONDENT'S REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE AND ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; AND NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT SIGNED THE PROPOSED ORDER AWARDING $1500 IN REASONABLE ATTORNEY FEES AND $615.17 IN COSTS (PER THE DECLARATION OF LESLIE FREEMAN, WHICH IS DIFFERENT FROM THE MEMORANDUM OF COSTS SUBMITTED WITH THE MOTION). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Hrg On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bob Somal, Esq. of WGS Law Corporation, Tel. 510.338.3643, appearing specially for the respondent; No other appearance.

RULING: Respondent's counsel did not notify petitioner of his intent to appear at today's hearing. The court denied respondent's request for continuance and adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES in their capacities as Trustees of the CARPENTERS HEALTH AND WELFARE TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA; and NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the proposed order awarding $1500 in reasonable attorney fees and $615.17 in costs (per the declaration of Leslie Freeman, which is different from the Memorandum of Costs submitted with the motion). Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award; Index
Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION HOLIDAY TRUST FUND FOR, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN & NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm ArbITRATION Award IS Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, not reported.
